claimText: HGSE (Harvard Graduate School of Education) school-level policy: It is forbidden to make personal recordings of any course meetings, with or without AI tool integrations. Uploading substantial course content is only allowable through the Harvard-approved AI Sandbox.

citation.citationTitle: HGSE AI Policy on Student Use of Generative AI in Academic Work
citation.publisher: Harvard Graduate School of Education – Office of the Registrar
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
